title: Error Classes, Discriminated Results, Causes, Retry, and Session Recovery · Compiler Case: Pokedex Ts Session Recovery
summary: Catch blocks treat unknown as Error without narrowing, HTTP and validation failures share prose, retry wraps non-idempotent state transitions, causes are lost, and any rejection closes the session. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex ts session recovery increment in causal typed recovery decision model. Learners progress through…
objectives: Return recoverable command errors to the prompt, close only on explicit lifecycle outcomes, and prevent unhandled rejections.
Retry only transient idempotent fetches under attempt, total time, spacing, fair-use, and AbortSignal limits.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
